title: Remove onboarding modal so users land directly on main app

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' onboarding modal entirely so authenticated users land directly on the main app without name-entry interruption
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' modal (name entry + Continue button) is no longer rendered anywhere in the app.
After authenticating via Internet Identity, the user lands directly on the main app (LandingPage or Dashboard) with no modal interruption.
All code references that trigger or conditionally show the ProfileSetup modal (e.g., in AppLayout or any parent component) are removed or disabled.
The registration flows (Director, Production House, and Advertising Professional) remain accessible from the main app for users to self-register.

file_operations.description: Delete the ProfileSetup modal component entirely as it is no longer needed for the onboarding flow.

Remove all references to ProfileSetup component including its import statement and any conditional rendering logic that displays the modal based on authentication or profile state. Ensure the layout renders children directly without checking for profile setup status.

Remove any references to ProfileSetup component or logic that conditionally shows the modal on the landing page. Ensure authenticated users see the landing page content directly without modal interruption.
Remove any references to ProfileSetup component or logic that conditionally shows the modal on the dashboard. Ensure authenticated users see the dashboard content directly without modal interruption.
